nasb.text: Moreover, stand in the holy place according to the sections of the fathers’ households of your brethren the lay people, and according to the Levites, by division of a father’s household.

esv.text: And stand in the Holy Place according to the groupings of the fathers’ houses of your brothers the lay people, and according to the division of the Levites by fathers’ household.

cnv.text: 你們要按著你們的親族這平民的家族的班次，侍立在聖所；每個班次中要有幾個利未家族的人。

ccb.text: 你们要按你们弟兄所在宗族的班次，侍立在圣所，每个班次中要有几个利未宗族的人。
